name: code-review
description: Review a pull request — security, style, and a written verdict.

steps.instruction: Read the full diff for PR #{pr_number}. Summarize what changed and why.
steps.title: Read Pr

steps.instruction:
Evaluate whether this PR touches auth, secrets, input handling, or anything
network-facing. Write an artifact with the evidence. If it does touch security-sensitive code, list the security checks required. If it does not, document why no dedicated security review is needed.
steps.title: Assess Security

steps.instruction: Read the security assessment artifact. If security-sensitive code is touched, audit the changed files against the OWASP top 10 and flag each issue with a file:line and a concrete fix. If not, write an artifact documenting that no security review was needed and cite the assessment evidence.
steps.title: Security Review

steps.instruction: Check the diff against the project's conventions and formatting.
steps.title: Style Check

steps.instruction:
Write the review: a verdict (approve / request changes), grouped findings,
and the single most important thing to fix first.
steps.title: Write Review
